title: Beehiiv vs Buttondown (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Beehiiv vs Buttondown: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Beehiiv and Buttondown comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Buttondown targets developers and technical writers who prefer markdown. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers And Technical Writers Who Prefer Markdown

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on newsletter publishers and media operators
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers and technical writers who prefer markdown

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv wins for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Buttondown is stronger for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Buttondown?
faq.a: Buttondown starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $39/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Buttondown to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Buttondown to Beehiiv is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
